questions.question: After his resurrection, how many days did Jesus appear to the apostles before being taken up?
Who was chosen to replace Judas as one of the twelve apostles?
Jesus told the disciples they would know the exact times and dates the Father has set for restoring the kingdom.
But you will receive power when the Holy _____ has come upon you. You will be witnesses to me in Jerusalem, in all Judea and Samaria, and to the uttermost parts of the earth.
While they were looking steadfastly into the sky as he went, two men stood by them in white _____.
